Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: this is a fairly complex supply chain process with multiple parallel paths and decision points

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The user wants open ended questions that probe deeper into the rationale and potential improvements not just surface level understanding

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I need to cover different aspects process design choices risk management decision logic stakeholder coordination and performance metrics

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For process design I can ask about parallel sourcing and quality checks

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For risk management things like single points of failure and compliance challenges

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Decision making questions could explore demand forecasting and rework thresholds

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Stakeholder questions should cover communication protocols and transparency

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Performance metrics need both efficiency and customer centric measures

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The questions should be provocative but not leading no implied answers

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Each one should stand alone but collectively cover the whole process from component sourcing to end customer delivery
